title: Production Manual Gift Repeat Popup — Investigation Report

root_cause.repeat_popup: ACK worked (acknowledged_at updated) but getOldestPendingManualGrant() uses FIFO — after acknowledging grant N, verify on next poll (~3s) returned grant N+1 when multiple unacknowledged grants existed on the same device with transaction_id manual_grant:{latest}.
proof_timeline: Grant #71 (custom, legacy_token) and #72 (standard) both unacknowledged; transaction_id=manual_grant:72
POST acknowledge-manual-gift with grantId=71 → ok=true, acknowledged_at set on grant 71
After cascade-ack deploy (8944a46): single ack of grant 72 → manualGift=null on next verify
root_cause.not_client_bug: Backend returned a new legitimate pending grant each poll; client correctly showed popup each time.
root_cause.not_ack_failure: recent_ack_sample shows grant 71 acked at 2026-07-03T23:27:24Z on c8a894198a39ddc3

sql_answers.q9_after_single_ack_before_fix: next FIFO grant returned on verify
sql_answers.q9_after_cascade_fix: all pending grants id<=txn manual_grant id acked in one ASANTE

repaired_this_incident.note: Prior session repaired 25 stale; testing queue empty

example_timelines.repeat_cause: FIFO second grant after first ack

example_timelines.note: 1 stale grant (transfer source pending sub) — eligible for stale repair only, not testing

fixes_applied.8944a46: Cascade acknowledge through current manual_grant transaction id on ASANTE

production_verification.cascade_ack_c8a894: PASS — after ack grant 72, verify manualGift=null
